faq.question: Luggage room
faq.answer: You can leave your luggage securely in our luggage room at Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_en: You can leave your luggage securely in our luggage room at Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_ru: Вы можете безопасно оставить багаж в камере хранения в Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_cs: Zavazadla muzete bezpecne ulozit v ulozne zavazadel ve Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).

faq.question: Check-in time
faq.answer: Check-in starts at 14:00. If you arrive earlier, you can leave your luggage at Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_en: Check-in starts at 14:00. If you arrive earlier, you can leave your luggage at Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_ru: Заезд начинается с 14:00. Если вы приезжаете раньше, можно оставить багаж в Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_cs: Check-in zacina ve 14:00. Pokud prijedete drive, muzete nechat zavazadla ve Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).

faq.question: Check-out time
faq.answer: Check-out is until 11:00. After check-out, you can leave your luggage securely at Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_en: Check-out is until 11:00. After check-out, you can leave your luggage securely at Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_ru: Выезд до 11:00. После выезда можно безопасно оставить багаж в Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_cs: Check-out je do 11:00. Po odjezdu muzete bezpecne ulozit zavazadla ve Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).

faq.question: Airport transfer
faq.answer: We can arrange airport transfer. Price: 35 EUR per car one way (3-4 people) or 51 EUR for minivan (up to 8 people). Round-trip: 58 EUR per car or 87 EUR for minivan. To book, email front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz with your flight number and arrival/pick-up time.
faq.answer_en: We can arrange airport transfer. Price: 35 EUR per car one way (3-4 people) or 51 EUR for minivan (up to 8 people). Round-trip: 58 EUR per car or 87 EUR for minivan. To book, email front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz with your flight number and arrival/pick-up time.
faq.answer_ru: Мы можем организовать трансфер из/в аэропорт. Цена: 35 EUR за машину в одну сторону (3-4 человека) или 51 EUR за минивэн (до 8 человек). Туда-обратно: 58 EUR за машину или 87 EUR за минивэн. Для брони напишите на front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz номер рейса и время прилета/выезда.
faq.answer_cs: Muzeme zaridit transfer z/na letiste. Cena: 35 EUR za auto jednim smerem (3-4 osoby) nebo 51 EUR za minivan (do 8 osob). Zpetna cesta: 58 EUR za auto nebo 87 EUR za minivan. Pro rezervaci napiste na front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz cislo letu a cas prijezdu/vyzvednuti.

faq.question: How to check in
faq.answer: You can complete check-in independently via the self check-in kiosk inside the building. Use code 3621# at the main entrance, then use the kiosk on the left side. You need your booking number and a valid passport or EU citizen ID card.
faq.answer_en: You can complete check-in independently via the self check-in kiosk inside the building. Use code 3621# at the main entrance, then use the kiosk on the left side. You need your booking number and a valid passport or EU citizen ID card.
faq.answer_ru: Вы можете пройти самостоятельный заезд через киоск self check-in внутри здания. Для входа используйте код 3621# на главной двери, затем слева будет киоск. Нужны номер брони и действующий паспорт или ID-карта гражданина ЕС.
faq.answer_cs: Check-in muzete provest samostatne pres self check-in kiosk uvnitr budovy. Pro vstup pouzijte kod 3621# na hlavnich dverich, kiosk je vlevo. Potrebujete cislo rezervace a platny pas nebo obcansky prukaz EU.

faq.question: What is booking number
faq.answer: Booking number is the number you receive after making a reservation.
faq.answer_en: Booking number is the number you receive after making a reservation.
faq.answer_ru: Номер брони — это номер, который вы получаете после оформления бронирования.
faq.answer_cs: Cislo rezervace je cislo, ktere obdrzite po provedeni rezervace.

faq.question: Booking number is not working
faq.answer: Please contact the portal where you made your reservation, or send your full name from the reservation and wait for reception response.
faq.answer_en: Please contact the portal where you made your reservation, or send your full name from the reservation and wait for reception response.
faq.answer_ru: Пожалуйста, свяжитесь с порталом, где вы сделали бронирование, или отправьте полное имя из брони и дождитесь ответа ресепшн.
faq.answer_cs: Kontaktujte prosim portal, kde jste rezervaci vytvorili, nebo poslete cele jmeno z rezervace a pockejte na odpoved recepce.

faq.question: Parking
faq.answer: Parking is available in neighboring buildings for around 20 EUR per night (depends on car size and availability). To reserve, email front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz with car model and exact dimensions.
faq.answer_en: Parking is available in neighboring buildings for around 20 EUR per night (depends on car size and availability). To reserve, email front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz with car model and exact dimensions.
faq.answer_ru: Парковка доступна в соседних зданиях примерно за 20 EUR за ночь (зависит от размера авто и наличия мест). Для брони отправьте на front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz модель и точные размеры автомобиля.
faq.answer_cs: Parkovani je k dispozici v sousednich budovach cca za 20 EUR za noc (zalezi na velikosti vozu a dostupnosti). Pro rezervaci poslete na front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz model auta a presne rozmery.

faq.question: SPA
faq.answer: We do not offer SPA services, but we can arrange Thai massage. Please email front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_en: We do not offer SPA services, but we can arrange Thai massage. Please email front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_ru: Мы не предоставляем SPA-услуги, но можем организовать тайский массаж. Напишите на front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_cs: SPA sluzby nenabizime, ale muzeme zaridit thajskou masaz. Napisete prosim na front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.

faq.question: Breakfast
faq.answer: We recommend Coffee Factory. Hotel guests receive 10% discount on the full menu. Please inform cafe staff at payment that you are a guest.
faq.answer_en: We recommend Coffee Factory. Hotel guests receive 10% discount on the full menu. Please inform cafe staff at payment that you are a guest.
faq.answer_ru: Рекомендуем кофейню Coffee Factory. Гости отеля получают скидку 10% на все меню. При оплате сообщите, что вы гость отеля.
faq.answer_cs: Doporucujeme kavarnu Coffee Factory. Hoste hotelu maji 10% slevu na cele menu. Pri platbe informujte personal, ze jste host hotelu.

faq.question: Wi-Fi
faq.answer: Wi-Fi network name: Coffee Factory. Password: Legerova48. If you cannot connect, contact reception.
faq.answer_en: Wi-Fi network name: Coffee Factory. Password: Legerova48. If you cannot connect, contact reception.
faq.answer_ru: Сеть Wi-Fi: Coffee Factory. Пароль: Legerova48. Если не подключается — напишите ресепшн.
faq.answer_cs: Wi-Fi sit: Coffee Factory. Heslo: Legerova48. Pokud se neprihlasite, kontaktujte recepci.

faq.question: Room cleaning
faq.answer: Standard cleaning is scheduled once for longer stays. For stays of 7 nights or more, we change towels and bed linen. Please leave rubbish bags outside your door; we collect them between 8:00 and 10:00 in the morning. For any extra cleaning, please contact us in this chat or reception.
faq.answer_en: Standard cleaning is scheduled once for longer stays. For stays of 7 nights or more, we change towels and bed linen. Please leave rubbish bags outside your door; we collect them between 8:00 and 10:00 in the morning. For any extra cleaning, please contact us in this chat or reception.
faq.answer_ru: Уборка проводится один раз при более длительном проживании. При брони от 7 ночей — смена полотенец и постельного белья. Мусор можно оставить в пакете за дверью номера: с 8:00 до 10:00 утра мы его забираем. Нужна дополнительная уборка — напишите нам в этом чате или свяжитесь с ресепшн.
faq.answer_cs: Standardni uklid planujeme jednou u delsich pobytu. Pri pobytu 7 a vice noci menime rucniky a povleceni. Odpadky nechte v pytli u dvere pokoje; mezi 8:00 a 10:00 je vyzvedneme. Pro dodatecny uklid nas kontaktujte v tomto chatu nebo na recepci.

faq.question: Late check-out
faq.answer: Late check-out until 12:00 costs 10 EUR; until 13:00 costs 20 EUR. If you need to stay longer, please contact reception so we can confirm availability and options.
faq.answer_en: Late check-out until 12:00 costs 10 EUR; until 13:00 costs 20 EUR. If you need to stay longer, please contact reception so we can confirm availability and options.
faq.answer_ru: Поздний выезд: до 12:00 — 10 EUR, до 13:00 — 20 EUR. Если нужно остаться дольше — обязательно свяжитесь с ресепшн, чтобы согласовать возможность и условия.
faq.answer_cs: Pozdni check-out: do 12:00 za 10 EUR, do 13:00 za 20 EUR. Pokud chcete zustat dele, kontaktujte recepci kvuli dostupnosti a podminkam.

faq.question: Early check-in
faq.answer: Early check-in is possible only upon availability. If room is not ready, you can leave luggage at Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_en: Early check-in is possible only upon availability. If room is not ready, you can leave luggage at Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_ru: Ранний заезд возможен только при наличии свободного номера. Если номер не готов, можно оставить багаж в Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_cs: Brzky check-in je mozny pouze podle dostupnosti. Pokud pokoj neni pripraven, muzete nechat zavazadla ve Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).

faq.question: Invoice and payment documents
faq.answer: For invoice or payment confirmation, please send your booking details and billing data to front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_en: For invoice or payment confirmation, please send your booking details and billing data to front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_ru: Для счета или подтверждения оплаты отправьте данные бронирования и реквизиты на front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_cs: Pro fakturu nebo potvrzeni platby poslete udaje o rezervaci a fakturacni data na front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.

faq.question: Extra bed and baby cot
faq.answer: Extra bed or baby cot depends on room type and availability. Please contact reception before arrival.
faq.answer_en: Extra bed or baby cot depends on room type and availability. Please contact reception before arrival.
faq.answer_ru: Дополнительная кровать или детская кроватка зависит от типа номера и наличия. Уточните заранее на ресепшн.
faq.answer_cs: Pristylka nebo detska postylka zavisi na typu pokoje a dostupnosti. Kontaktujte recepci pred prijezdem.

faq.question: Pets
faq.answer: Please contact reception in advance to confirm pet policy for your booking.
faq.answer_en: Please contact reception in advance to confirm pet policy for your booking.
faq.answer_ru: Пожалуйста, заранее свяжитесь с ресепшн, чтобы уточнить правила размещения с питомцами для вашей брони.
faq.answer_cs: Prosim kontaktujte recepci predem a overte podminky ubytovani se zviraty pro vasi rezervaci.

faq.question: Quiet hours and noise complaint
faq.answer: Quiet hours are from 23:00 to 07:00. If there is noise or disturbance at any time, please write immediately in this chat and we will forward it to reception.
faq.answer_en: Quiet hours are from 23:00 to 07:00. If there is noise or disturbance at any time, please write immediately in this chat and we will forward it to reception.
faq.answer_ru: Тихий час с 23:00 до 7:00 утра. Если шум или беспокойство в любое время — сразу напишите в этот чат, мы передадим запрос на ресепшн.
faq.answer_cs: Tichy rezim je od 23:00 do 7:00. Pri hluku nebo ruseni kdykoli napiste ihned do tohoto chatu a predame to recepci.

faq.question: Lost and found
faq.answer: If you forgot an item, send room number, stay dates, and item description in this chat or to front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_en: If you forgot an item, send room number, stay dates, and item description in this chat or to front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_ru: Если вы забыли вещь, отправьте номер комнаты, даты проживания и описание предмета в этот чат или на front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_cs: Pokud jste zapomneli vec, poslete cislo pokoje, datum pobytu a popis predmetu do tohoto chatu nebo na front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.

faq.question: Emergency
faq.answer: For emergencies (fire, injury, immediate danger), call local emergency services first and then contact reception in this chat.
faq.answer_en: For emergencies (fire, injury, immediate danger), call local emergency services first and then contact reception in this chat.
faq.answer_ru: При чрезвычайной ситуации (пожар, травма, непосредственная опасность) сначала позвоните в экстренные службы, затем напишите на ресепшн в этот чат.
faq.answer_cs: V pripade nouze (pozar, zraneni, bezprostredni nebezpeci) nejdrive volejte zachranne slozky a potom kontaktujte recepci v tomto chatu.

faq.question: Cancellation and refund
faq.answer: Cancellation and refund conditions depend on your booking source and rate. Please contact the booking portal or reception with reservation details.
faq.answer_en: Cancellation and refund conditions depend on your booking source and rate. Please contact the booking portal or reception with reservation details.
faq.answer_ru: Условия отмены и возврата зависят от источника и тарифа бронирования. Свяжитесь с порталом бронирования или ресепшн, указав данные брони.
faq.answer_cs: Podminky zruseni a vraceni penez zavisi na zdroji rezervace a tarifu. Kontaktujte portal rezervace nebo recepci s udaji rezervace.

faq.question: Late arrival after midnight
faq.answer: Late arrival is possible. Please send your expected arrival time in advance so reception can prepare check-in instructions.
faq.answer_en: Late arrival is possible. Please send your expected arrival time in advance so reception can prepare check-in instructions.
faq.answer_ru: Поздний заезд после полуночи возможен. Пожалуйста, заранее сообщите время прибытия, чтобы ресепшн подготовил инструкции по заезду.
faq.answer_cs: Pozdni prijezd po pulnoci je mozny. Prosim poslete predem cas prijezdu, aby recepce pripravila pokyny k check-inu.

faq.question: Group booking
faq.answer: For group bookings, please contact front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz with dates, number of guests, and room preferences.
faq.answer_en: For group bookings, please contact front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz with dates, number of guests, and room preferences.
faq.answer_ru: Для группового бронирования напишите на front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz даты, количество гостей и предпочтения по номерам.
faq.answer_cs: Pro skupinovou rezervaci napiste na front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz datumy, pocet hostu a preference pokoju.

faq.question: Smoking policy
faq.answer: Our apartments are strictly non-smoking. Smoke detectors are installed throughout. Smoking may result in a fine of up to 500 EUR.
faq.answer_en: Our apartments are strictly non-smoking. Smoke detectors are installed throughout. Smoking may result in a fine of up to 500 EUR.
faq.answer_ru: У нас строго некурящие апартаменты, установлены датчики дыма. За курение может взиматься штраф до 500 EUR.
faq.answer_cs: Apartmany jsou striktne nekuracke, jsou nainstalovane detektory koure. Za koureni muze byt ulozena pokuta az 500 EUR.

faq.question: Damage and incident report
faq.answer: If there is damage or incident in the room, please report it immediately in this chat with room number and short description.
faq.answer_en: If there is damage or incident in the room, please report it immediately in this chat with room number and short description.
faq.answer_ru: Если в номере есть повреждение или инцидент, сразу сообщите в этот чат, указав номер комнаты и краткое описание.
faq.answer_cs: Pokud je na pokoji skoda nebo incident, nahlaste to ihned do tohoto chatu s cislem pokoje a kratkym popisem.

faq.question: Business invoice
faq.answer: For company invoice, please provide company billing details and reservation reference to front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_en: For company invoice, please provide company billing details and reservation reference to front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_ru: Для счета на компанию отправьте реквизиты компании и номер брони на front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_cs: Pro firemni fakturu poslete fakturacni udaje firmy a cislo rezervace na front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.

faq.question: Contact reception
faq.answer: For additional help, please write in this chat or contact front desk at front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_en: For additional help, please write in this chat or contact front desk at front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_ru: Для дополнительной помощи напишите в этот чат или свяжитесь с ресепшн: front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_cs: Pro dalsi pomoc napiste do tohoto chatu nebo kontaktujte recepci: front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
